stemHtml:
At the last minute, 15 passengers were unable to board an aircraft, resulting in a weight reduction of 1500 kg. The operational flight plan shows that a weight reduction of 1000 kg will apply a 205 kg reduction to the aircraft's trip fuel. Calculate the new trip fuel required for the flight.
(Use interpolation)

options.a: 205 kg less than the original trip fuel requirement.
options.b: 308 kg less than the original trip fuel requirement.
options.c: The same as the original trip fuel requirement.
options.d: 205 kg more than the original trip fuel requirement.
